segments.text: Today, I bow to all the Sahaja Yogis who have found
The Truth. There has been from ages
a seeking for The truth and when people discovered
that there is no other way but surrender
To the Divine
That you can find The Truth
They did not know how do it
How work It out
They have been seekers all over the world.
I went to Turkey and was amazed there had been lots of Sufis,
but their disciples were not realized souls
because the Sufis also did no know how they got their realization
Such darkness existed around people who where seeking
Allover The World I find when i was a little girl
that they are completely ignorant about how to find the truth.
So many were lost in all kinds of so-called religions and rituals,
–all kind of ritual they used do– morning till evening some sort of a ritual
they would do, whether there were Hindus, Christians or Muslims.
They all believed that by doing these rituals you will achieve something –
That is when we know the truth and get your Self-realization
All such seekers went to wrong people
And in different directions because
they were really seeking from their heart.
So, there was very misleading –
misleading and they were mislead
into such horrible black areas
that the did not know what
They are supposed to seek
What have you got?
It has been prophesied
That when Kali Yuga will come
people will find themselves.
There's a story about Nala and Kali
who had taken away the wife,
the mainty of Nala
so once Nala caught hold
And he said that now I'm going to kill you
because we are very mischievous man
and you have done such a harm to Me."
So the Kali said,
You can kill me but before that
we should know what is My importance.
What my mahatma?
And then My important is
when My time will come
When Kali Yuga Will Come
Then all those people who are seeking
The truth in the jungles
in the hills and gales,
In The Himalayas
will become ordinary householders.
They'll be house-holders
they won't be sannyasis going about
there'lbe households
And then we find that
this is being prophesied long time back
an also theres a book about it
as you must have read
in the book, which says that
time has come for people to know themselves.
Every religion has said one thing
– you must know yourself!
Islam say'sthe same
Buddha say'sthe same
Christians Say The Same
Hindus Say The Same
So till then they go on
doing all kinds of acrobats
But they realized that we haven't found the truth.
So it came to my lot from childhood I knew
had do with, but when saw human beings
how much in darkness there were about themselves
How aggressive and how sinful
all their style was so cruel
It was unbelievable. That's the time also I saw Hitler coming up and our country
is in complete bondage, so first thing to make our country free
was very important and that's why I took a
Very,very active role in the movement
That Was for The freedom of our country
same with my father mother
but when we got the freedom somehow
after some time
We Got lost
people started taking to all kinds of modern things
wrong, which were so-called entertaining. With all that I found
over the world there was a big seeking force and some false
people took full advantage of it! They went out made lots
& lot's money with their falseness they cursed them,
don't know what did to you? So many seekers were lost
Despite that, I went to America and I was shocked how the things were going on there.
But i couldn't help it because they where so mentally ill-equipped
They could not understand what have you got
And You can pay for truth
Then It happened that
I had started it after the Sahastrara was broken.
And you know that story, how i broke the Sahasrara
and from one person
has given realization but from America
got very disappointed
.I was thinking ,how will grow? How will work out?
We have about twenty five people
who were realized soul by them in India
But they realized what they have got by realization.
They realized that
the had become very good people,
given up all bad habits and
were wanting to worship Me
I said no don't worship me
because
People will not understand
but one day forced me
so on our terrace of house
they came and worshipped Me, because somebody had told them this is the Goddess.
So what happened was after that program one maidservant who was possessed came up
And she started calling me by name of goddess
so people said What are you saying?
She's a woman but talking like man
So she said, I am telling you the truth.
She is a Goddess who has come to save us."
Her language was not that of a maid servant
but very well educated Brahmin
Who would say all Adi Shankaracharya's Tothras
It was surprising
so they asked her several questions
and then just fainted
So I told them just don't listen to her, it's no use.
But they would not agree and said Mother we have to worship you so somehow i agreed
that and got hold of seven brahmins who were afraid because to do puja is very dangerous
and it could harm you, if is not the truth.
But on contrary when they were doing the puja
They got their Realization
And just said now this Is The Truth
They felt a cool breeze in Their hand
All the symptoms told about a realized soul started
but I didn't want to say everything at that time
because there are many others who were saying
I am this,I'm that. So i didn't want to expose it all together but gradually
as found out people got attracted and they used
come into my program
And then the Sahaja Yoga started spreading
All over in a very interesting manner
so these Sahasrara
day or we can solve when the Sahastra was opened up
It's a very important, it is very subtle.
We just know about the Kundalini
that she has coiled up in three and half
And She lies on the triangular bone known as Sakra
but we don't what She works or how She works
What happens to us?
She rises in six centers and breaks the seventh, I should say, breaks the sixth center
because Ganesha's Center doesn't play any role.
So when she breaks
those Sixth Center which is the Sahasrara
then she connects you to all-pervading power of Divine Love
What Is this Divine love?
What does this do? It is the energy of the Mother, they can say it as the energy of Adi Shakti
which all over works through vibrations. But what are these vibrations?
It's a very subtle energy that starts flowing through your Sahastrara.
All the thousand petals of the Sahasrara get slowly enlightened and it starts flowing
throughout you body, throughout hands feet – throughout to our body!
And the more you are, I mean your attention is on the Sahastrara,
The More it works faster.
Now in science have read that they've discovered an energy called
They call it, what was the scientist?
Forget this sir! What energy? Quantum energy.
Quantum, I don't know why they call it quantum because quantum is full.
So this might be meaning the energy of Ganesha maybe –I dunno–because scientists are
blind people and what do you want to say?
They're saying there's a quantum energy now this quantum energy according to them
flows in a very subtle manner and it is normally not visible, but It has light.
You have seen that since so many of photographs
Of mine this slight of all kind
This energy moves you know like
So the quantum energy I think again
I am not very sure, because scientists have always found them a little bit weak.
But this quantum energy they are talking about
is something like the spiritual energy or
The Energy of Love which flows around
and these quantum energies
They do no know what it does
but they've seen that It has got light
They call it quantum because according to them,
It flows in bundles and every bundle is a quanta.
Now this energy when it flows as you have seen yourself
,it works .It works
In Every Direction
..In Every Dimension
For Example
It Works Physically
Supposing You Have Some Physical Element
We've Seen Many People Get Cured
Just in My presence. I need not do anything to them, or also as soon
As you see somebody i know what he's suffering from
That is my connection with the Divine
And that tells me whats wrong and what should be done
It can cured at no time because it comes to Me just like
I mean, I don't ask any questions.
i dont try to find out
,I do not analyze
but it just says do like this
or
It also doesn' t say
.It Just does
.It Just works automatically
..it is very difficult
...to explain how
....this energy works
But all of you who have got Realization
can also workout your own energies
How?
By releasing
it, by feeding it. By giving to others – by experimenting! Of course Sahaja Yoga has
spread because of you only? You are the people who have brought people into Sahajyoga but
that's not end off with we had saved this world for at least I feel forty percent
of people should get their realization.
Whatever may be the nationality,
whatever maybe they're education – anything!
They are to given Self-realization
in our Indian scriptures is clearly written
without Atma Sakshatkar your life is useless
but what's atma sakshatkar?
Is that knowledge about yourself
how can you have this knowledge
unless and until you become one with this all-pervading power.
So it was a very great thing I felt
that the Sahastrara,
could open in 1970
–I realized i was overwhelmed
because knew
This is only trouble
It's an obstacle human beings are having
Because their Sahasranaras aren't opened
That's why they are going in the darkness, that is where
They're having wars.
Thats'why their have all kinds of problems
But if their Sahasrara opens and
If there become one with a divine power
All thier problem should be solved
Every type or problem will be solved
And then we'll very happy people
I realized it
I was overjoyed, but nobody understood Me.
They thought that I must be talking something nonsensical!
Nobody understood it what it is
because even in the Shastras
It's not written about Kundalini so clearly
Only one great saint called Gyaneshwara
wrote In his book in the sixth chapter
About The Kundali
It's not so clear, only He said that with the Kundalini you can get your awakening.
Also You sing this song always I have heard which says O Kundalini Mother please be awakened
but nobody knows what is Kundalini and why are we singing it?
It was all in our country people used to sing, so clearly but nobody understood the meaning
of it.
Just they used singing as some sort bhajan or could be music concert
But no body knew what is talking about
There's such a misunderstanding about everything
And all these poets also who have written clearly about awakening,
About realization. Everything was just in the books
They would read one line of a book and then stop there
Another person will start another line
Then he stops at other point
Like that they were just reading
Same thing
about all the scriptures. There was big misunderstanding created and
Was used for, The purpose of their own self-interest
That is how
We couldn't get people who understood what were self realization
It was just For some money or from certain type of a position to get
People started Big big
organizations, very big religious organizations. I don't know what to call them but none of
the were realized souls for example there was a great saint called Viditama who went
to China. And he started a religion called Zen,
Zen means Dhyana and
He wanted put Zen in such manner that people become thoughtless
She made big tank full of sand with patterns
and put some stones. And he had said that you sit on the edge of this pond
just see but don't think, people didn´t understand what it was
Normally anybody would go there
Oh! This looks like ships in sea or all kinds things
But nobody tried for thoughtless awareness
And I told some of them that this is for thoughtless awareness, but they couldn't understand.
Then we have also in Japan Tao. He talked about the All-Pervading Power which was Tao
and Lao Tse who did... he has described saints how the saints are
How they behave, how the talk. What is their mannerism? Everything
But how you become a saint nobody says I think throughout there has been no description
How to make
A person into a saintly personality so also in that 12th century
Gyaneshwara was
in the 12th century. He talked about it and he said
everything, because
It was a kind of style that
A guru should have only one disciple who
Should give to One Disciple realization
Not too many. I don't know why
What made them such a law or rule
And then started in the 12th century
There were Many saints
who sang the praise of Realization and all
them thought that these rituals are no good, so they discarded
rituals. But what was
thing had to happen? Nobody knew
I have read
their lives
I've read afterwards also many saints
were there but it seems nobody
how raise the Kundalini
This was the basic problem they didn't know how to raise the Kundalini.
While I think,
They did not have that power or maybe they had no knowledge
–they talked about kundalini all right
but then it is not known
How To Raise The Kundalini
this a very special Power of Spirituality
None Of Them Have Been Able
to say or tell you how to raise the Kundalini.
Now, You all have got this power which is such a rare thing!
All of you has it.
I don't see anybody who doesn' t hae that power
To Raise The Kundalini
.You may not
,you maybe contented with yourself
but thats's no very good think
If u've got your Sahasrara opened out
and if U know How To Raise The kundalini
You must go all out to give Realization, nothing is going
benefit people more than Self-Realization.
No use doing other charities giving money
or this – it's of no use!
Best thing you should do in order
see the people who want their realization
and then give them realization
I was very happy that they have started working
out on the gypsies. I have a special feeling for gypsys,
For no fault of theirs they are leading very miserable life
and how did Gypsy's got realization?
You can see that you give it to anyone who wants
one thing is there but cannot force
if he has desire pure desire
they can get Self-realization.
So this day, I have to just say now so many years have passed
and worked quite hard
Day & Night
And my only desire was
that you people should take
it seriously
an work It out
Don't keep your realization to yourself
As Many as People You Can Give Realization
the greatest obligation will be on Me
and on God Almighty.
Only thing is you should try to give realizations
To others,
You will never make a mistake
because the Kundalini knows
She know's your realized soul
she'll respect it
Even if she makes mistakes
She corrects it
And she helps
In every way
I am just
I should say, a housewife who had no support from anyone.
But i was sure that it's my job to find out how
To break the Sahasrara whatever way
It is outside doesn't matter
My Job he wants
To Find Out The Breaking of Sahastra which
Which I did now you also know
That so this Is your job and
And the scientists now will be coming around you to ask questions because they don't know
what we are talking about is, What We Are Already Doing.
So You're so powerful all of them!
But how many people really doing this work?
Is a point today's very important day I want tell you that you have to strengthen
My hands.
They say the Goddess has one thousand hands, but even the one-thousand hands are now asking
that you come along with your two hand and work it out.
It's very important what we have to do!
All kinds of problems in this world they come because ignorance – take it politics
take it, any problem. And how is solved? Is also your power with the Divine. I'll give
you one simple example that Turkish people came and were begging of Me, Mother You
must come! We should not postpone. My passport was a problem – I said my passport
is not ready, how will I come? Then I thought why not we'll have the passport also done.
So passports was ready and they wanted me to go Turkey because say that financial condition
has gone down very much, economy had gone down absolutely, we are ruined!
i went there ,I didn't do anything about it within two days they announced ten billion
dollar help from the World Bank. Now I didn't talk to World Bank, had nothing
do with them
i don' know then I said no maybe you see they're helping because
You people are in such trouble but so many countries are why have
They helped us only?
So now
Now, I was surprised in Turkey there are only ladies mostly who are leaders most and they
have done such a big job.
So i want to see what you people doing your country?
You may say that my countries the peoples hopelessly bad maybe .I don't know but
still their places ,their pockets where can go talk with them tell them specially
the media you must handle. It is something we have to do and find out why
You can't do it, like Me I was not supported by anybody
Not helped by anyone
And how i managed break the Sahastrara
Now, you can also break the Sahastrara of others.
It's not difficult because My vision is that this world at least should have 40% people
who are realized souls and who are practicing Sahaja Yoga
Who're giving realization to peopIe
And trying tO change the peopIe. Anybody you cAn go and tell anybody
There's no need to discriminate or find out, sit down with their… I mean people take
sometimes the copy of education and that is not needed.
Whosoever it may be – I am saying give them to dogs
or to animals, but to human beings wherever they are.
They may be anything –
there maybe English and they could be Germans
,they would be Italians
anywhere I am told also some people
doing lots of seminars
working very hard on all levels
And it is working out
among Muslims we have started working
and even in India it has worked. You don't know, people have not lost all their heads
so that they can work out
Don´t be very much disappointed
or upset about
Gradually things will improve
I think the greatest enemy of our self-realization
is drinking
Drinking... If we take to drink
They become such slaves
Their brains are not alright
So, I think the Sahastrara also must be spoiled with drinking.
so Drinking is worst anyway and if you could find anybody who can help that man to give
up drinking itself it will work out of course we have other enemies like false gurus are
Also we have other enemies who are having some sort of religious manipulations but that's
not so important.
If you can get hold off people, I tell it will change and they'll now understand
that what they have been doing so far, drinking, running away.
Now They'll come to the fields and They will work out such a way."
So you are like very gentle soldiers of love
And thats' What You Have To Spread
& talk with others give them That joy
Not be satisfied if you've got it only
or few off you haven't
You have to spread it very fast and you can do, because
It doesn't require money.
He does not require any shoe
If is just inside its works
Its already there
Its present there
Everybody has
I knew all that
Of course i know
But now
U also knows
So u should work
And work
In the manner
That
Im sure
One day
This world will be
A change please
